_note: Generated from docs/variables.md in itzg/docker-minecraft-server. Re-fetch from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itzg/docker-minecraft-server/master/docs/variables.md when refreshing.

vars.name: AUTOPAUSE_KNOCK_INTERFACE
vars.description: Describes the interface passed to the knockd daemon. If the default interface does not work, run the ifconfig command inside the container and derive the interface receiving the incoming connection from its output. The passed interface must exist inside the container. Using the loopback interface (lo) does likely not yield the desired results.

vars.name: AUTOPAUSE_PERIOD
vars.description: describes period of the daemonized state machine, that handles the pausing of the process

vars.name: AUTOPAUSE_TIMEOUT_EST
vars.description: describes the time between the last client disconnect and the pausing of the process

vars.name: AUTOPAUSE_TIMEOUT_INIT
vars.description: describes the time between server start and the pausing of the process, when no client connects in-between

vars.name: AUTOPAUSE_TIMEOUT_KN
vars.description: describes the time between knocking of the port (e.g. by the main menu ping) and the pausing of the process, when no client connects in-between

vars.name: AUTOSTOP_PERIOD
vars.description: describes period of the daemonized state machine, that handles the stopping of the serve

vars.name: AUTOSTOP_TIMEOUT_EST
vars.description: describes the time between the last client disconnect and the stopping of the server

vars.name: AUTOSTOP_TIMEOUT_INIT
vars.description: describes the time between server start and the stopping of the server, when no client connects in-between

vars.name: BROADCAST_RCON_TO_OPS
vars.description: Sets broadcast-rcon-to-ops server property

vars.name: CF_API_KEY
vars.description: YOUR CurseForge (Eternal) API Key.

vars.name: CF_API_KEY_FILE
vars.description: A path to a file inside of container that contains YOUR CurseForge (Eternal) API Key.

vars.name: CF_EXCLUDE_INCLUDE_FILE
vars.description: Global and per modpack exclusions can be declared in a JSON file and referenced with this variable. By default, the file bundled with the image will be used, but can be disabled by setting this to an empty string. The schema of this file is documented here.

vars.name: CF_EXCLUDE_MODS
vars.description: Mods can be excluded by passing a comma or space delimited list of project slugs or IDs

vars.name: CF_FILE_ID
vars.description: The mod curseforge numerical ID.

vars.name: CF_FILENAME_MATCHER
vars.description: Specify a substring to match the desired filename

vars.name: CF_FORCE_INCLUDE_MODS
vars.description: Mods can be included by passing a comma or space delimited list of project slugs or IDs

vars.name: CF_FORCE_SYNCHRONIZE
vars.description: Forces the excludes/includes to be re-evaluated

vars.name: CF_MOD_LOADER_VERSION
vars.description: Override the mod loader version declared by the modpack

vars.name: CF_OVERRIDES_SKIP_EXISTING
vars.description: if set, files in the overrides that already exist in the data directory are skipped. world data is always skipped, if present.

vars.name: CF_PAGE_URL
vars.description: Pass a page URL to the modpack or a specific file

vars.name: CF_PARALLEL_DOWNLOADS
vars.description: specify how many parallel mod downloads to perform

vars.name: CF_SET_LEVEL_FROM
vars.description: Some modpacks come with world/save data via a worlds file and/or the overrides provided with the modpack. Either approach can be selected to set the LEVEL to the resulting saves directory by setting this to either: WORLD_FILE; OVERRIDES;

vars.name: CF_SLUG
vars.description: Instead of a URL, the modpack slug can be provided.

vars.name: CONSOLE
vars.description: Some older versions (pre-1.14) of Spigot required --noconsole to be passed when detaching stdin

vars.name: DEBUG_AUTOPAUSE
vars.description: Adds additional debugging output for AutoPause

vars.name: DEBUG_AUTOSTOP
vars.description: Adds additional logging for AutoStop

vars.name: DIFFICULTY
vars.description: The difficulty level. Available values: peaceful,easy,normal,hard

vars.name: ENABLE_AUTOPAUSE
vars.description: Enable the Autopause functionality

vars.name: ENABLE_AUTOSTOP
vars.description: Enable the AutoStop functionality

vars.name: ENABLE_JMX
vars.description: To enable remote JMX, such as for profiling with VisualVM or JMC, add the environment variable ENABLE_JMX=true

vars.name: ENABLE_RCON
vars.description: Enable/disable RCON support; however, be aware that disabling RCON will remove and limit some features, such as interactive and color console support.

vars.name: ENABLE_ROLLING_LOGS
vars.description: Legacy option. Rolling logs are now enabled by default via templated log4j2 configuration. This option is maintained for backward compatibility but only used for error reporting

vars.name: ENABLE_WHITELIST
vars.description: Enable the whitelist to manually manage the whitelist

vars.name: EULA
vars.description: You MUST set this to true

vars.name: EXTRA_ARGS
vars.description: Arguments that would usually be passed to the jar file (those which are written after the filename)

vars.name: GID
vars.description: The linux group id to run as

vars.name: GUI
vars.description: Some older servers get confused and think that the GUI interface is enabled.

vars.name: ICON
vars.description: The url or file path for the icon image to use for the server. It will be downloaded, scaled, and converted to the proper format.

vars.name: INIT_MEMORY
vars.description: Independently sets the initial heap size

vars.name: JMX_HOST
vars.description: If JMX is enabled, set JMX_HOST to the IP/host running the Docker container, and add a port forwarding of TCP port 7091

vars.name: JVM_DD_OPTS
vars.description: As a shorthand for passing several system properties as -D arguments, you can instead pass a comma separated list of name=value or name:value pairs with JVM_DD_OPTS. (The colon syntax is provided for management platforms like Plesk that don't allow = inside a value.)

vars.name: JVM_OPTS
vars.description: General JVM options can be passed to the Minecraft Server invocation by passing a JVM_OPTS environment variable. The JVM requires -XX options to precede -X options, so those can be declared in JVM_XX_OPTS. Both variables are space-delimited, raw JVM arguments

vars.name: JVM_XX_OPTS
vars.description: General JVM options can be passed to the Minecraft Server invocation by passing a JVM_OPTS environment variable. The JVM requires -XX options to precede -X options, so those can be declared in JVM_XX_OPTS. Both variables are space-delimited, raw JVM arguments

vars.name: LEVEL
vars.description: Maps to the level-name server property. You can either switch between world saves or run multiple containers with different saves by using the LEVEL option

vars.name: LOG_CONSOLE_FORMAT
vars.description: Log4j2 pattern for console output (what you see in docker logs)

vars.name: LOG_FILE_FORMAT
vars.description: Log4j2 pattern for file logs (written to logs/latest.log)

vars.name: LOG_LEVEL
vars.description: Root logger level (trace, debug, info, warn, error)

vars.name: LOG_TERMINAL_FORMAT
vars.description: Log4j2 pattern for interactive terminal console (used with docker attach)

vars.name: LOG_TIMESTAMP
vars.description: To include the timestamp with each log set to true

vars.name: MAX_MEMORY
vars.description: independently sets the max heap size

vars.name: MEMORY
vars.description: The image declares an initial and maximum Java memory-heap limit of 1 GB.

vars.name: MODE
vars.description: Minecraft servers are configured to run in Survival mode by default. You can change the mode using MODE where you can either provide the standard numerical values or the shortcut values: creative; survival; adventure; spectator(minecraft 1.8 or later);

vars.name: MOTD
vars.description: Set the server log in message.

vars.name: OVERRIDE_ICON
vars.description: The server icon which has been set doesn't get overridden by default. Set this to TRUE to override the icon

vars.name: OVERRIDE_WHITELIST
vars.description: Enforce regeneration of the whitelist on each server startup.

vars.name: PROXY
vars.description: You may configure the use of an HTTP/HTTPS proxy by passing the proxy's URL

vars.name: RCON_CMDS_FIRST_CONNECT
vars.description: RCON commands to execute on the first client connection to the server.

vars.name: RCON_CMDS_LAST_DISCONNECT
vars.description: RCON commands to execute when the last client disconnects from the server.

vars.name: RCON_CMDS_ON_CONNECT
vars.description: RCON commands to execute whenever a client connects to the server.

vars.name: RCON_CMDS_ON_DISCONNECT
vars.description: RCON commands to execute whenever a client disconnects from the server.

vars.name: RCON_CMDS_STARTUP
vars.description: RCON commands to execute when the server starts.

vars.name: RCON_PASSWORD
vars.description: You MUST change this value

vars.name: RCON_PASSWORD_FILE
vars.description: Can be set to read the RCON password from a file. Overrides RCON_PASSWORD if both are set.

vars.name: RCON_PORT
vars.description: The port for RCON

vars.name: RESOURCE_PACK
vars.description: A link to a custom resource pack

vars.name: RESOURCE_PACK_ENFORCE
vars.description: Enforce the resource pack on clients

vars.name: RESOURCE_PACK_SHA1
vars.description: The checksum for the custom resource pack

vars.name: ROLLING_LOG_FILE_PATTERN
vars.description: Pattern for rolled/archived log file names

vars.name: ROLLING_LOG_MAX_FILES
vars.description: Maximum number of archived log files to keep

vars.name: SERVER_PORT
vars.description: Maps to the server-port server property. Only change this value if you know what you're doing. It is only needed when using host networking and it is rare that host networking should be used.

vars.name: SETUP_ONLY
vars.description: If you are using a host-attached data directory, then you can have the image setup the Minecraft server files and stop prior to launching the server process by setting this to true

vars.name: STOP_DURATION
vars.description: When the container is signalled to stop, the Minecraft process wrapper will attempt to send a "stop" command via RCON or console and waits for the process to gracefully finish.

vars.name: STOP_SERVER_ANNOUNCE_DELAY
vars.description: To allow time for players to finish what they're doing during a graceful server shutdown, set STOP_SERVER_ANNOUNCE_DELAY to a number of seconds to delay after an announcement is posted by the server.

vars.name: TZ
vars.description: You can configure the timezone to match yours by setting the TZ environment variable. alternatively, you can mount: /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro /etc/timezone:/etc/timezone:ro

vars.name: TYPE
vars.description: The server type

vars.name: UID
vars.description: The linux user id to run as

vars.name: USE_AIKAR_FLAGS
vars.description: Aikar has done some research into finding the optimal JVM flags for GC tuning, which becomes more important as more users are connected concurrently

vars.name: USE_FLARE_FLAGS
vars.description: To enable the JVM flags required to fully support the Flare profiling suite.

vars.name: USE_MEOWICE_FLAGS
vars.description: MeowIce has created an updated set of JVM flags based on Aikar's flags but with support for optimizations for Java 17 and above

vars.name: USE_MEOWICE_GRAALVM_FLAGS
vars.description: enables MeowIce's flags for GraalVM if USE_MEOWICE_GRAALVM_FLAGS is TRUE

vars.name: USE_SIMD_FLAGS
vars.description: Support for optimized SIMD operation

vars.name: VERSION
vars.description: The minecraft version

vars.name: WHITELIST
vars.description: A list of usernames and/or UUIDs separated by comma

vars.name: WHITELIST_FILE
vars.description: A url or file path to a whitelist json formatted file.
